goit-pythonweb-hw-012
  • Module code
  • app.auth.deps

Source code for app.auth.deps

from fastapi import Depends, HTTPException, status
from fastapi.security import OAuth2PasswordBearer
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session

from app.database import get_db
from app.models import User
from app.auth.jwt import decode_token
from app.services.redis_cache import get_json, set_json, user_cache_key
from app.config import REDIS_TTL_SECONDS

oauth2_scheme = OAuth2PasswordBearer(tokenUrl="/api/auth/login")




[docs]
def get_current_user(db: Session = Depends(get_db), token: str = Depends(oauth2_scheme)) -> User:
    """
    Get current user from JWT access token.
    Uses Redis cache to avoid DB query on each request.
    Cached fields are minimal and safe: id, email, is_verified, avatar_url, role.
    """
    try:
        payload = decode_token(token)
    except ValueError:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED, detail="Invalid token")

    if payload.get("type") != "access":
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED, detail="Invalid token type")

    email = payload.get("sub")
    if not email:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED, detail="Invalid token payload")

    key = user_cache_key(email)

    # 1) Try Redis cache first
    cached = get_json(key)
    if cached:
        # detached lightweight user object
        user = User(
            id=cached["id"],
            email=cached["email"],
            hashed_password="!",
            is_verified=cached.get("is_verified", False),
            avatar_url=cached.get("avatar_url"),
            role=cached.get("role", "user"),
        )
        return user

    # 2) Fallback to DB
    user = db.query(User).filter(User.email == email).first()
    if not user:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED, detail="User not found")

    # 3) Cache minimal safe fields (NO hashed_password)
    set_json(
        key,
        {
            "id": user.id,
            "email": user.email,
            "is_verified": user.is_verified,
            "avatar_url": user.avatar_url,
            "role": user.role,
        },
        ttl=REDIS_TTL_SECONDS,
    )

    return user






[docs]
def require_verified_user(current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user)) -> User:
    """Allow access only for users with verified email."""
    if not getattr(current_user, "is_verified", False):
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN, detail="Email not verified")
    return current_user






[docs]
def require_admin(current_user: User = Depends(get_current_user)) -> User:
    """Allow access only for admin users."""
    if getattr(current_user, "role", "user") != "admin":
        raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN, detail="Admin privileges required")
    return current_user
